name: agent-octopus-toolkit
description: 面向 Claude Code / Codex 的可复用 agent 工作流工具包。

scripts.check: python3 -m py_compile sandbox/octopus_sandbox.py scripts/propose-changes.py scripts/apply-proposal.py scripts/validate-toolkit.py scripts/octopus-control.py && bash -n scripts/install.sh && python3 scripts/validate-toolkit.py
